name: calabash maker
functional_purpose: shape the dough into a calabash-like shape

construction_steps.reason: the cylindrical body will help shape the dough

construction_steps.Instruction: Add a hemispherical head at the top of the cylindrical body
construction_steps.reason: the hemispherical head will help create the calabash-like shape

construction_steps.Instruction: Add a cylindrical bottom at the bottom of the cylindrical body
construction_steps.reason: the cylindrical bottom will help create the calabash-like shape

construction_steps.Instruction: Add a flat base at the bottom of the cylindrical bottom
construction_steps.reason: the flat base will help the tool sit stably on the table

construction_steps.Instruction: Add a handle at the side of the cylindrical body
construction_steps.reason: the handle will allow the robot to hold and manipulate the tool

placement_func:
def placement():
    self.tool = scene.add_entity(
        gs.Morph.Mesh(
            filename="assembled_tool.stl",
            pos=(0.0, 0.0, 0.0),
            euler=(0, 0, 0),
            scale=(1, 1, 1),
        )
    )
    self.tool.set_simulation_properties(
        density=1000.0,
        friction=0.5,
        restitution=0.3
    )
